'''Worxer''', also called '''Yablon''', was a planet in the stellar drift clouds of [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. It was destroyed when its sun went [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]] around [[198 BBY]]. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] only managed to evacuate a few of the native [[Spiner]]s, and by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], most people believed the species extinct, a mistake not far from the truth. One remaining Spiner, by the name of Hedji, ws part of Han Solo's freelance group the 'Star-hoppers of Aduba 5', he spoke little of his past due to its suggested horror and distress.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Pablo Hidalgo]] named the Spine homeworld "Yablon" as a nod to Cliff Yablonski, a correspondent on the website somethingawful.com.<ref name="Endnotes">{{Blog|pablog|62|Tales of the Big Green Bunny: Behind the Scenes of Gamer #4 — And the Rest}}</ref>
